title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 160.250 - Citation of law — statutes involved
text:
160.250.  Citation of law — statutes involved. — The provisions of sections 37.710*, 160.250, 160.261, 160.262, 162.014, 162.068, 162.069, 168.021, 168.071, 168.133*, 210.135, 210.145*, 210.152*, 210.915, 210.922, and 556.037 relating to protecting children from sexual offenders shall be known as the "Amy Hestir Student Protection Act".
(L. 2011 S.B. 54 § 160.085) 
*Sections 37.710, 168.133, 210.145, and 210.152 are also included as part of the "Dominic James Memorial Foster Care Reform Act of 2004" in section 210.108.
